SportBetStatusTypeEnum.description:
Sport bet status type. Allowed values:
 'O'- OPEN
 'W'- WIN
 'L'- LOSE
 'w'- HALF WIN
 'I'- HALF LOSE
 'V'- VOID
 'D'- DELETE

PaymentType.description: Payment type used in PagFast operations. Allowed values correspond to deposit payment types.

PixKeyType.description: PixKeyType type used in PagFast operations. Allowed values correspond to deposit payment types.

CouponPlayResult.description: The result for a specific coupon within a sports bet.

ClaimablePromotion.description: A promotion that can be claimed with the bet.

SportsBetPlayResult.description: The result of a sports bet play, containing details about the bet and its potential returns.

CasinoBonusTypeEnum.description: Type of casino bonus. Allowed values: 'registration'- Bonus on registration 'automaticDeposit'- Bonus on automatic deposit
